commit.message:
Sync TransactionSet.transactions with generalized_tx_set after trimming

Reconstruct the flat transactions vector from the trimmed phase
contents instead of using the pre-trim selection. Previously, trim-
invalid transactions could remain in the flat vector while absent
from the generalized tx set, causing compare_tx_sets() to use
inflated op-count and fee metrics for local candidates.

Fixes #1184

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix: Remove domain restriction from central API routes

Problem:
- Central API routes were restricted to specific domains using Route::domain()
- In production (Render), the domain lookup was complex and routes weren't matching
- This caused CORS preflight (OPTIONS) to fail with 404
- Frontend couldn't reach /api/central/login or /api/tenants endpoints

Solution:
- Removed Route::domain() wrapper from central routes
- Routes are now available on all domains, security is handled by middleware:
  - CentralAdminAuth middleware validates tokens for protected routes
  - Throttle middleware protects login endpoint

Benefits:
- Simpler routing that works in all environments (local, Render, etc.)
- No more domain resolution issues
- CORS preflight requests now return 204 with proper headers
- Frontend can successfully authenticate and fetch tenant data

Affected routes:
- POST /api/central/login
- GET|POST /api/tenants (protected by central.admin middleware)
- GET|DELETE /api/tenants/{id} (protected by central.admin middleware)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: 棱镜（Prism）v0.1 — 多视角协同分析引擎

新增 prism/ 子系统，将多 Agent 协同分析能力正式化为可复用的标准流程：

架构
- 双协议族：独立取样型（explore/redteam/test）和议事型（council）
- 6 步独立取样协议：Frame → Dispatch(Firewall) → Collect(quorum) → Synthesize → Adjudicate → Archive
- 议事协议：N 轮收敛，共享前轮摘要，70% 阈值终止

关键设计决策（基于两轮 rubber-duck 评审）
- Dispatch Firewall：执行阶段 Agent 不得读取 reports/ 或他人中间产出
- 超时治理：30min 超时，1次重试，60% quorum
- Adjudicate 裁决：consensus/weak/deadlock/escalate 四档，deadlock 强制暂停等人类决策
- 记忆接入：采纳的结论沉淀至 knowledge/lessons.md（复活协议必读文件）
- 报告永久 git 追踪，index.yaml 结构化索引
- 触发条件改为风险信号驱动（不再用文件数量）
- §10 PM Gate 权威：Prism 无权推翻已锁定需求，冲突时 escalate

文件
- prism/README.md：概览和快速参考
- prism/protocol.md：完整协议（双协议族 + 触发条件 + 迁移矩阵 + index schema）
- prism/modes/：explore/redteam/test 各模式说明
- prism/roles/README.md：角色分配指南
- prism/reports/index.yaml：报告索引（初始为空）
- CONTRIBUTING.md §11：棱镜集成指南（§8/§9 保留，Prism 为系统化路径）

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Revert Newtonsoft.Json dependency tracking (#15596) (#15651)

Reverts the assembly resolution tracking and warning mechanism for
Newtonsoft.Json that was added in #15596. Investigation showed that:

- vstest's AssemblyResolver.OnResolve never fires for Newtonsoft.Json
  because it is loaded via normal CLR probing before the event triggers
- On .NET Framework, MSTest has its own AssemblyResolver in a separate
  AppDomain that resolves NJ independently from vstest's resolver
- The ProvidedDependencies telemetry was always empty in practice
- No feasible proactive warning mechanism exists for this scenario

The [DoNotParallelize] test fixes from the same PR are preserved.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add Catalog API fallback when GitHub SSO is unavailable

- Dashboard now works without private repo access by using the public
  Microsoft Learn Catalog API as a fallback data source
- Tries GitHub Trees API first (rich metadata: author, ms.date, etc.)
- Falls back to Catalog API automatically when repos return 403/404
- Supports hybrid mode: GitHub for accessible repos + Catalog for others
- Each FOLDER_PRODUCT_MAP entry now has catalogId for API matching
- Copilot Studio uses extraCatalogIds + titleMatch (same logic as index.html)
- Data source mode shown in UI (Catalog API / GitHub / hybrid)
- No token needed for basic functionality — token enhances with repo access

Remove customTopics from all CognitiveServices API versions (backfill) (#42012)

* Remove customTopics property, CustomTopicConfig, and RaiTopicConfig from all CognitiveServices API versions

Backfill removal of the customTopics property from RaiPolicyProperties,
along with CustomTopicConfig and RaiTopicConfig model definitions,
across all API versions since their introduction in 2025-07-01-preview.

Pre-TypeSpec versions (direct swagger JSON edit):
- 2025-07-01-preview
- 2025-09-01

Post-TypeSpec versions (@removed decorator + recompile):
- 2025-10-01-preview
- 2025-12-01
- 2026-01-15-preview

No example files reference these types — no example updates needed.

decorator to remove customTopics property, CustomTopicConfig, and RaiTopicConfig
definitions — consistent with all other post-TypeSpec versions in this PR.

commit.message:
fix: ensure vuln files are cached and re-extracted when missing

Two fixes to ensure per-arch vulnerability JSON files are always
available for the dashboard links:

1. fetch_suse_registry_images.py: tighten cache invalidation for
   container images - force re-extraction when:
   - vulnerabilities.source != 'attestation' (old Trivy data)
   - details_files is absent (migration from older attestation run)
   - any per-arch vuln file is missing from disk (cache cleared)

2. .github/workflows/static.yml: add vulns/ to the cache restore/save
   paths alongside sboms/, so per-arch vuln attestation files persist
   between workflow runs and are deployed to GitHub Pages

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Accept non-32-byte preimages for HashX extra_signers

Remove incorrect length check in has_hashx_signature() that rejected
valid HashX preimages not exactly 32 bytes. stellar-core accepts any
preimage length allowed by XDR and checks only sha256(preimage) == key.

Fixes #1173

commit.message:
fix(vip): increase default inter_conv_gap to 400ns for 2-context MPTDC

The MPTDC has N_CTX=2 contexts. With the old 50ns gap, a 3rd conversion
arrives while both contexts are still measuring, causing the async frontend
to reject it (any_ctx_free=0). 400ns ensures at least one context frees
before the next conversion starts.

Also adds optional gap_ps parameter to gen_tdc_conversions for tests
that need explicit control.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Remove duplicate startup flow-control grant in peer loop

The initial SEND_MORE_EXTENDED grant was sent twice: once in
Peer::handshake() after authentication (correct, matches stellar-core
recvAuth), and again at the start of run_peer_loop(). Remove the
duplicate to prevent granting 400/400000 credits instead of 200/300000.

Fixes #1172

commit.message:
fix: E2E use locator('text=ALICE-EDIT') instead of getByText

getByText has stricter matching that fails intermittently.
locator('text=...') is more reliable for substring text matching.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: rate limit only /api/upload, not all /api/* endpoints

The rate limiter was applied to all /api/* routes including /api/stream.
The video player makes many HTTP 206 range requests to buffer the video,
which immediately exhausted the burst limit (5) and returned 503 —
causing 'nothing loaded' in the editor after upload.

Fix: move limit_req to a dedicated /api/upload location block.
All other /api/* routes (stream, thumbnails, frame, export) are unrestricted.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: add Optimal Sell Price Analysis — HMM Monte Carlo with full path tracking

New feature accessible via tab toggle when stock data is loaded:
- 10,000 GBM paths with HMM regime switching (reuses existing HMM infra)
- Fan chart (p10-p90 bands) showing price envelope over time
- Touch probability curve — P(reaching target) vs price level
- Summary table with Target | P(touch) | Expected Value | PLN equiv
- Optimal target: maximizes E(sell) = P(touch)×target + (1-P(touch))×median
- Summary cards: optimal price, P(hit), expected value, downside risk
- Horizon presets: 21d / 63d / 126d / 252d

Architecture:
- SellAnalysisPanel lazy-loaded (separate 24KB chunk)
- Pure calc functions in src/utils/sellAnalysis.ts
- Hook src/hooks/useSellAnalysis.ts (only runs when tab active)
- Types in src/types/sellAnalysis.ts
- Exported mulberry32/boxMuller from hmm.ts for reuse

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix: Ensure CENTRAL_DOMAIN is properly included in central_domains array

Problem:
- The central_domains config was using array_filter() without a callback
- When CENTRAL_DOMAIN env var was null/empty, array_filter() removed it
- This broke API routes for the Render production domain
- Caused CORS errors and 'Cannot read properties of undefined' errors

Solution:
- Added explicit callback to array_filter() that only removes null/empty values
- Updated comment to reflect actual Render domain

Impact:
- Local: Routes work with localhost + 127.0.0.1
- Production (Render): Routes now work with sims-backend-api-0b2w.onrender.com
- Frontend can now successfully call /api/tenants and other protected endpoints

Fixes:
- CORS policy errors in browser console
- XMLHttpRequest network errors
- 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading payload)' errors

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(vip): settle delay after TDC events + correct word-count prediction

spadmic_driver: add 500 ns/conversion settle delay after inject_tdc_events()
to prevent a subsequent disable-CTRL from catching a transient path_idle
window between back-to-back MPTDC packets.

spadmic_tdc_ref_model: fix words_per_hit to match actual MPTDC v2.3 packet
format — RAW_FEATURES=3, RAW_TIMESTAMP=2, FULL=4 — and update the formula
base from 2+1 to 3 (header + subheader + EOC). Eliminates the spurious
'word count 48 != predicted 18' warnings.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Extract evaluateIPS into src/services/quant/ipsEngine.ts (#96)

* Initial plan

* Extract evaluateIPS to src/services/quant/ipsEngine.ts

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/silverlh614-lang/quantmaster-pro/sessions/c13c4729-af2f-4efe-8e63-e0174b560330

Co-authored-by: silverlh614-lang <273325592+silverlh614-lang@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: silverlh614-lang <273325592+silverlh614-lang@users.noreply.github.com>

Optimize PHR BA: vectorized residuals + sparse Jacobian (100x speedup)

Root cause of slowness:
- Old code used Python for-loops inside _phr_residuals (called ~500+ times by LM)
- method='lm' (dense Jacobian) required n_vars extra FD evaluations per step
- scipy Rotation object creation per call was expensive

Fixes applied:
- Fully vectorized _phr_residuals_vec using NumPy einsum (no Python loops)
- Batch Rodrigues formula _rotvec_to_matrix_batch: (N,3)->>(N,3,3) via algebra
- Sparse Jacobian pattern _build_sparsity: each obs depends only on its cam+pt
- Switched least_squares from method='lm' to method='trf' + jac_sparsity
- Reduced max_nfev from 500 to 200 (warm start needs fewer iterations)

Results (BA time, same rotation accuracy):
- llff_fern:  42.9s -> 0.06s  (700x faster)
- kitchen:    26.2s -> 0.04s  (650x faster)
- llff_flower:32.0s -> 0.06s  (530x faster)
- room:        0.7s -> 0.02s
- sceaux:     38.5s -> 0.02s (1900x faster)

Total PHR time now 0.18-0.55s (was 17-43s), competitive with FF and SfM.
Rotation accuracy unchanged (PHR still best on all scenes with GT).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: restore apiBase default for local dev

Changing the default to '' broke local dev — API calls became relative
URLs pointing at the Nuxt server instead of localhost:8080.

Restore default to http://localhost:8080 for local development.
Docker overrides this to '' explicitly via NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE in
docker-compose.yml so the nginx proxy handles /api/* routing.

commit.message:
fix: arm TDC conv_arm before injecting cal events

The MPTDC async frontend gates start events with conv_arm_i
(mptdc_async_frontend_v2.sv:108). Without writing CSR_CTRL.conv_arm=1
to each per-axis MPTDC, cal start/stop pulses are silently ignored.

Added program_tdc_conv_arm() to both CSR and I2C drivers, called
during drive_ctrl after max_hits programming.

when image digests haven't changed.

commit.message:
fix: wait for config commit + drain delay before test ends

Two fixes for TDC smoke test functional failures:

1. Driver now calls wait_cfg_accept() AFTER program_global_ctrl() to
   ensure the sequencer has committed the requested config to the
   active image before injecting events. Without this, events arrive
   while active_global_enable is still 0.

2. EOT handler now waits drain_timeout_ns (default 50us) before
   returning, giving the MPTDC pipeline time to produce and serialize
   packets before the monitors are killed by env.run() join_any exit.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: use per-arch cosign attestations for SBOM and vuln data

Replace single-tag CycloneDX SBOM extraction and local Trivy scanning
with per-architecture cosign attestation extraction for SUSE registry
container images.

Changes:
- fetch_suse_registry_images.py: replace extract_sbom() with
  extract_attestations_per_arch() which uses crane manifest to enumerate
  per-arch digests, then runs cosign verify-attestation --type cyclonedx
  and --type vuln per digest using {image}@{digest} addressing.
  Vuln summary (counts + scan_date from metadata.scanFinishedOn) is
  stored directly in image_data["vulnerabilities"]. If no attestation
  is found the field is omitted and the dashboard shows N/A.
  Both sboms/ and vulns/ dirs are created on startup.

- process_vulnerabilities.py: remove Trivy scanning for registry images
  entirely. Chart aggregation now reads vuln data already populated by
  the fetch step. Trivy is kept only for GHCR images.

- generate_dashboard.py: SBOM badges now include the architecture suffix
  (e.g. "CycloneDX (amd64)") to distinguish per-arch SBOMs.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: prevent unauthorized access to other clients' event images on login/signup screens

- Add authentication check in clientLogin.js slider initialization
- Add authentication check in clientSignup.js slider initialization
- Only display event images if user is already authenticated
- This prevents unauthenticated users from seeing other clients' events
- Both old and new clients can no longer see each other's event images on login screen
